name: 2x2 OLL
description: Ortega OLL for 2x2 — 7 cases. Orients all pieces on the last layer of the 2x2 cube. Part of the Ortega method.

algorithms.name: 2x2 OLL Sune
algorithms.notation: R U R' U R U2 R'

alternatives.notation: R U R2 U' R2 U R
R U' L' U R' U' L

algorithms.name: 2x2 OLL Anti Sune
algorithms.notation: R U2 R' U' R U' R'

alternatives.notation: y L' U' L U' L' U2 L
y' R' U' R U' R' U2 R

algorithms.name: 2x2 OLL Pi
algorithms.notation: F R U R' U' R U R' U' F'

alternatives.notation: R U' R2 U R2 U R2 U' R
R U2 R2 U' R2 U' R2 U2 R

algorithms.name: 2x2 OLL P
algorithms.notation: F R U R' U' F'

alternatives.notation: y2 F U R U' R' F'

algorithms.name: 2x2 OLL L
algorithms.notation: y F' R U R' U' R' F R

alternatives.notation: F R U' R' U' R U R' F'
F R' F' R U R U' R'
